message:
test(search-core): add 33 tests for hybrid candidate orchestration

Expand hybrid_candidates.rs from 6 to 39 tests covering:
- QueryClass::classify edge cases (empty, whitespace, underscore,
  slash paths, mixed alphanumeric, single word, long sentences)
- CandidateMode/CandidateSource/QueryClass serde roundtrips
- CandidateBudgetConfig default invariants
- CandidateBudget::derive comprehensive coverage: all mode/class
  combinations, min/max clamping, empty queries zero semantic,
  lexical fallback zero semantic, NL favors semantic, identifier
  favors lexical, combined_limit >= requested_limit
- scaled_ceil_limit: overflow saturation, zero inputs, rounding up
- prepare_candidates: both empty, lexical-only, semantic-only,
  complete overlap dedup, combined_limit truncation, first_source
- prepared_candidate_cmp: best_rank preference, rank tie doc_id
  tiebreak, both-ranks-none, semantic rank as secondary tiebreaker
- CandidateStageCounts default, CandidateBudget serde roundtrip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
